Entry.JapaneseText: 君達が悪い人間じゃないのはわかってる。 だけど、人は話し言葉次第で 周りのみんなに誤解されてしまうものなんだ
Entry.EnglishText: I know you guys aren't bad people. But depending on what you say and how, the people around you could misunderstand what you mean.

Entry.JapaneseText: だからもっと きちんとした話言葉を学んでくれ
Entry.EnglishText: So you should take the time to learn how to speak more precisely.

Entry.JapaneseText: きちんと話しすぎて そっちのイメージもたれても めんどくせぇと思うけどな
Entry.EnglishText: If you talk too precisely though, I think it'd be pretty annoying to leave people having that kind of image of you.

Entry.JapaneseText: んだよ！ お前の相棒の話し方も オレらと大差ねェじゃねェか！
Entry.EnglishText: What the hell?! Your partner's way of talkin' ain't even all that different from how we talk!

Entry.JapaneseText: いやいや。 おまえらよりはマシなんじゃねぇか？
Entry.EnglishText: Nah, nah. Compared to you guys, I'm totally less objectionable.

Entry.JapaneseText: でも品行方正な感じじゃないだろ！
Entry.EnglishText: But you don't even GIVE the feeling of having good conduct!

Entry.JapaneseText: うっ、それを言われると……
Entry.EnglishText: Ack... When you say it like that...
